text: Wireless mic kit in a compact yellow-and-black case, marked RX and TX, with transmitter, receiver, and charging dock slots built into the foam. Sitting next to it is a small orange handheld recorder with a screen and dial. Compact audio gear keeps getting smaller and more purpose-built here.

Bright orange earbud case sitting open on a wooden desk, ear hooks visible on both buds. Simple color choice but it stands out immediately next to all the black and white gear around it. Small detail, but this kind of packaging design gets noticed on a shelf.
